'''鈭歯-k-sh''' ('''kanakash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:pelter|pelter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pelter|pelter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-k-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kanakash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinakash|thinakash]] || [[word:jinakash|jinakash]] || [[word:shinakash|shinakash]] || [[word:kinakash|kinakash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunakash|thuthunakash]] || [[word:jujunakash|jujunakash]] || [[word:shushunakash|shushunakash]] || [[word:kukunakash|kukunakash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunakash|thunakash]] || [[word:junakash|junakash]] || [[word:shunakash|shunakash]] || [[word:kunakash|kunakash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunakash|thunakash]] || [[word:junakash|junakash]] || [[word:shunakash|shunakash]] || [[word:kunakash|kunakash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenakash|thenakash]] || [[word:jenakash|jenakash]] || [[word:shenakash|shenakash]] || [[word:kenakash|kenakash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonakash|thothonakash]] || [[word:jojonakash|jojonakash]] || [[word:shoshonakash|shoshonakash]] || [[word:kokonakash|kokonakash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonakash|thonakash]] || [[word:jonakash|jonakash]] || [[word:shonakash|shonakash]] || [[word:konakash|konakash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonakash|thonakash]] || [[word:jonakash|jonakash]] || [[word:shonakash|shonakash]] || [[word:konakash|konakash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]] || [[word:nakash|nakash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nakash|th忙nakash]] || [[word:j忙nakash|j忙nakash]] || [[word:sh忙nakash|sh忙nakash]] || [[word:k忙nakash|k忙nakash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanakash|thathanakash]] || [[word:jajanakash|jajanakash]] || [[word:shashanakash|shashanakash]] || [[word:kakanakash|kakanakash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanakash|thanakash]] || [[word:janakash|janakash]] || [[word:shanakash|shanakash]] || [[word:kanakash|kanakash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanakash|thanakash]] || [[word:janakash|janakash]] || [[word:shanakash|shanakash]] || [[word:kanakash|kanakash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanakash|shanakash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanakash|goshanakash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanakash|gokishanakash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanakashn眉|shanakashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanakashnkn眉|goshanakashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakashn眉|gokishanakashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanakashsh毛|shanakashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanakashnksh毛|goshanakashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanakashsh毛|gokishanakashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakashro|shanakashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakashnkro|goshanakashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakashro|gokishanakashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakashmu|shanakashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakashnkmu|goshanakashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakashmu|gokishanakashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanakashsher|shanakashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanakashnksher|goshanakashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanakashsher|gokishanakashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanakashng|shanakashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanakashnkng|goshanakashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanakashng|gokishanakashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanakashya|shanakashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanakashnkya|goshanakashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanakashya|gokishanakashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanakashyam|shanakashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanakashnkyam|goshanakashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanakashyam|gokishanakashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanakashn眉sh毛|shanakashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanakashnkn眉sh毛|goshanakashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanakashn眉sh毛|gokishanakashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakashn眉ro|shanakashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakashnkn眉ro|goshanakashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakashn眉ro|gokishanakashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakashn眉mu|shanakashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakashnkn眉mu|goshanakashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakashn眉mu|gokishanakashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanakashsh毛n眉|shanakashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanakashnksh毛n眉|goshanakashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakashsh毛n眉|gokishanakashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakashsh毛ro|shanakashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakashnksh毛ro|goshanakashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakashsh毛ro|gokishanakashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakashsh毛mu|shanakashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakashnksh毛mu|goshanakashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakashsh毛mu|gokishanakashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanakashron眉|shanakashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanakashnkron眉|goshanakashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakashron眉|gokishanakashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanakashrosh毛|shanakashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanakashnkrosh毛|goshanakashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanakashrosh毛|gokishanakashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanakashromu|shanakashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanakashnkromu|goshanakashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanakashromu|gokishanakashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanakashmun眉|shanakashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanakashnkmun眉|goshanakashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanakashmun眉|gokishanakashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanakashmush毛|shanakashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanakashnkmush毛|goshanakashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanakashmush毛|gokishanakashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanakashmuro|shanakashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanakashnkmuro|goshanakashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanakashmuro|gokishanakashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
